# Hi there, I'm Justyna! 👋

I am a C++ and Python software development enthusiast focused on algorithms, data structures, and low-level programming. I love building custom implementations of complex systems to truly understand how they work under the hood.

---

### 💻 Core C++ Projects

Here are some of the key projects you can find in my repositories:

*   **[Blockchain](https://github.com/Justynnna/simple-blockchain-cpp)** - A lightweight blockchain implementation focusing on cryptography, block hashing, and decentralized ledger mechanics.
*   **[BigNumber Class](https://github.com/Justynnna/BigInt-cpp)** - A custom C++ library designed for handling arbitrarily large integers, featuring optimized arithmetic operations that bypass standard hardware limits.
*   **[Custom Map Template Container](https://github.com/Justynnna/Custom-map-cpp)** - A header-only associative container implemented via a linked list, using the **Proxy Design Pattern** for smart memory management and subscript `[]` operations.
*   **[Generic Singly Linked List](https://github.com/Justynnna/Generyczna-lista-jednokierunkowa)** - A clean, template-driven implementation of a custom linked list data structure with manual pointer manipulation and custom iterators.

---
